tldr: Switch from Agora's RTC platform to Stream's Video and Chat APIs, remapping channels to Stream calls and re-issuing user tokens.
why_switch: Bundled chat plus video from a single vendor
Higher-level call abstractions instead of raw RTC primitives
Strong SDK coverage across web, iOS, Android, React Native
Built-in moderation and reactions for chat
what_to_export: Token-issuing logic and user identity model
Custom signaling and RTM message flows
export_method: Most call state is ephemeral. Export your room inventory from your own database, pull recordings from Agora's cloud storage to your bucket, and document any RTM messaging flows. User identities should already live in your own auth system.
import_method: Create a Stream app with Video enabled, install Stream's Video SDK on clients, and issue user tokens server-side. Map Agora channels to Stream calls and recreate them as sessions begin. If you also use Agora RTM for chat, replace it with Stream Chat in the same migration. Run both stacks in parallel during cutover.

concept_mapping.note: Stream calls cover the same room concept
Use Stream Chat for messaging-style signaling
Confirm output protocols match your CDN
Different role model; remap before cutover

gotchas: Platform parity may differ; verify Unity/Flutter coverage
Pricing scales with MAU and call minutes — model both
Recording formats and storage hooks differ from Agora
RTM-style signaling needs a redesign on Stream primitives
Permission and role models do not map 1:1

email.subject: Cancelling Agora account
email.body:
Hi Agora team,

We're migrating our real-time video and signaling workload to Stream. Please confirm the cancellation date and any final billing on our account.

Thanks.
